title: Why Xi Doesn’t Need a Deal With Trump
summary_full: President Xi Jinping of China is buying time for Beijing and may see an opening with a U.S. president weakened by the war in Iran.
summary_public: President Xi Jinping of China is buying time for Beijing and may see an opening with a U.S. president weakened by the war in Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: weakened by the war in Iran
